texto: More negatives write than call. It's a cheap shot for me to go on the air with the critical letters or E-mail I get because the reaction of the listeners is always an instantaneous expression of sympathy for me and contempt for the poor critic.
explicacao: Citação de John Hall sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “More negatives write than call. It's a cheap shot for me to go on the air with the critical lette…” articula reflexao, me, poor em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como poor e reaction.
